channel.title: Decantika — All Clones, Designers & Niche Copy
channel.description: Latest clone/designer/niche copy decant listings at Decantika

item.title: Summer Vibes - Maison Alhambra - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Maison Alhambra
Type: Maison Alhambra
Price: 1.99

Summer Vibes - Maison Alhambra

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Compared to: Sun Song by Louis Vuitton


Scent profile:

 

Fragance Notes:

- Top Notes: Blackcurrant, Coriander, Lemon, Citron, Orange, Mint

- Middle Notes: May Rose, Carrot Seeds, Apricot, Basil

- Base Notes: Fig, Dates, Ambrette

 

Information:

Concentration: Eau De Parfum 

Target Gender: Unisex

Recommended for: Hot Temperatures.

 

Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

item.title: Infinity Silver - Armaf - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Armaf
Type: Armaf
Price: 2.49

Infinity Silver by Armaf

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Inspired by: L'Homme Ultime by Yves Saint Laurent

 
Scent profile:



Fragance Notes:

- Top: Bergamot, Ginger, Grapefruit

- Heart: Rose, Geranium, Apple. Cardamom

- Base: Cashmere Wood, Cedar, Vetiver


Information:

Concentration: Eau de Parfum

Olfactive Notes: Citrus, Rose, Fresh Spicy, Aromatic, Floral, Woody

Target Gender: Men

Recommended for: Versatile. All seasons


Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

item.title: Ornament Pour Homme - Afnan - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Afnan
Type: Afnan
Price: 1.99

Ornament Pour Homme by Afnan

1ml Decant Spray Sample

 Compared to Wanted by Azzaro

Scent profile:

 

 

Fragance Notes:

- Top:  Amber, Patchouli, Woody Notes, Ozonic Notes

- Heart: Spicy Notes, Aromatic Notes, Vanilla

- Base: Balsamic Notes, Rose, Aquatic Notes

 

Information:

Concentration: Eau de Parfum

Olfactive Notes: Warm Spicy, Woody, Fresh Spicy, Fruity, Aromatic, Fresh, Amber, Patchouli, Green

Target Gender: Men

Recommended for: Versatile Temperatures. 

Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

item.title: December Vanilla - Paris Corner - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Decantika
Type: Paris Corner
Price: 1.99

December Vanilla by Paris Corner

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Inspired by: Vanilla Royale Sugared Patchouli | 64 by Kayali Fragrances


Scent profile:




Fragance Notes:

- Top: Rum, Vanilla Orchid, Jasmine

- Heart: Vanilla, Spicy Notes, Creme Brulee, Tonka Bean, Leather, Rose

- Base: Patchouli, Brown Sugar, Agarwood, Oud, Amber, Musk


Information:

Concentration: Eau De Parfum 

Target Gender: Unisex

Recommended for: Cold Temperatures. Fall, Winter


Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

item.title: Game Of Spades Double Bonus - Jo Milano - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Jo Milano
Type: Jo Milano
Price: 2.75

Game Of Spades Double Bonus by Jo Milano

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Inspired by: Météore by Louis Vuitton

Scent profile:

 

 

Fragance Notes:

- Top: Bergamot, Mandarin, Orange

- Heart: Pink Pepper, Pepper, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Neroli

- Base: Vetiver

 

Information:

Concentration: Parfum

Olfactive Notes:  Warm Spicy, Fresh Spicy, Soft Spicy, Aromatic, Musky

Gender: Unisex

Recommended for: Versatile Temperatures,

 

Disclaimer:

Top: Cinnamon, Orange Blossom, Lemon, Sage, Basil

Base: Sweet Notes, Patchouli, Black Amber, Brazilian Rosewood
